title: Beads Task Plan
description: Structured task plan for bd-from-plan script execution. Maps markdown plan sections to beads epics and tasks with dependency tracking.

source.description: Path to the source markdown plan file

prefix.description: Beads ID prefix for all created issues (e.g., 'auth', 'feat'). Used as: prefix-epic-task

workflow.description: Project-wide defaults for quality gates and commit strategy. Individual tasks inherit these unless they override.

quality_gate.description: Single executable command that runs all quality checks (e.g., 'composer lint && composer test && composer type'). The agent MUST verify this command runs successfully before generating the plan.

commit_strategy.description: Default commit strategy for all tasks

checklist_note.description: Human-readable workflow summary appended to every task description as a checklist. Should include quality gate steps, commit instructions, and bd close reminder.

epics.description: Top-level work streams, each becoming a beads epic

id.description: Epic ID suffix. Combined with prefix: prefix-id

description.description: Epic description with context from the plan

labels.description: Labels to apply to the epic

source_sections.description: Markdown heading(s) this epic maps to (e.g., '## 1. Authentication')

tasks.description: Tasks within this epic, each becoming a beads task

id.description: Task ID suffix. Combined with epic: prefix-epicId-taskId

description.description: Detailed task description extracted from the plan

labels.description: Labels to apply to this task

depends_on.description: Task IDs this task depends on (same format as id: just the suffix). Can reference tasks in other epics using epicId-taskId format.

source_sections.description: Markdown heading(s) this task maps to

quality_gate.description: Overrides workflow-level quality gate for this task. Single executable command.

commit_strategy.description: How to commit after completing this task

coverage.description: Coverage report ensuring the entire plan is mapped to tasks

total_sections.description: Total number of content sections in the markdown

mapped_sections.description: Number of sections mapped to at least one task

unmapped.description: List of section headings not mapped to any task. Must be empty for the plan to be valid.

context_only.description: Sections explicitly marked as context/overview (not requiring tasks)
